name: Q1 summarize compose-and-write
note: Q1 (enabling units U2, U3, U6; Phase 1-2). Reads the pointed source, GENERATES a summary + acceptance criteria, then WRITES the generated text into a real surface via write_note. The read+write auto-runs (reversible). MUST NOT emit a literal type_text "summarize ..." (actionTexts stays empty) and MUST NOT click a Summarize button. Red until the compose-and-write capability + intent-aware prompt land.
transcript: Summarize that issue and tell me the acceptance criteria.

name: Q3 open that — reversible navigation click
note: Q3 (existing element risk gate; Phase 1). A benign navigation / disclosure / tab click is reversible and auto-runs — it must NOT be over-gated as mutating. Red until non-commit clicks are tiered reversible and "open that" resolves to a click.

name: Q4 draft type — reversible, no send
note: Q4 (existing risk gate + U2; Phase 1). Types the draft CONTENT into the pointed input as a reversible draft and emits NO send/Enter step. actionTexts is the content only ("QA smoke from Director") — not the deictic "here" nor the "do not send" constraint. Diverges intentionally from the existing mutating "type hello into that" golden: a draft-type is reversible per the demo run sheet. Red until type drafts are tiered reversible and content is extracted cleanly.
transcript: Type QA smoke from Director here, but do not send.

name: Q8a pause that agent — interrupt control
note: Q8 pause (existing interrupt path; Phase 1). "Pause that agent" is a loop/run control interrupt, not a CUA action plan: read-only, auto-runs, dispatches no CUA step (actionKinds empty, target_agent none). Red until the parser recognizes the "pause that agent" phrasing (today only the exact "pause"/"pause it" parse).

name: Q8b replay what happened — read-only audit reveal
note: Q8 replay (existing audit path; Phase 1). "Replay what happened" reveals the audit trail read-only — it auto-runs, mutates nothing, and dispatches no CUA action (actionKinds empty, target_agent none). The pointed surface (the Intention Log) is the referent. Red until a replay/audit-reveal vocabulary is parsed; the intent_type "replay" string is a placeholder for that vocabulary.
